title: Western Digital (WDC)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Western Digital. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what WDC is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-omwdafyi>
WDC is emerging from a severe industry downturn. TTM FCF is strong, and we expect 15% annual growth over the next 5 years as pricing for flash memory and high-capacity HDDs remains robust, driven by AI data center needs and constrained supply.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
